<?php namespace Spatie\Html\Elements\Attributes; /** * @method static disabledIf(bool $condition, bool $disabled) * @method static disabledIfNotNull(bool $condition, bool $disabled) * @method static disabledUnless(bool $condition, bool $disabled) */ trait Disabled { /** * @param bool $disabled * * @return static */ public function disabled($disabled = true) { return $disabled ? $this->attribute('disabled', 'disabled') : $this->forgetAttribute('disabled'); } }
